# JDP Landscaping

JDP Landscaping is a locally owned and operated landscaping company serving the greater Charlotte, NC area. The business is fully insured and built on referrals.

## Services

- Mulching — fresh dark mulch for beds and borders
- Lawn Trimming — shrub, hedge, and tree trimming
- Removal — shrub, tree, and overgrowth removal and haul-away
- Planting — plant selection and installation
- Yard Cleanup — seasonal and post-storm debris clearing and bed cleanup

## Service Area

Charlotte, Marvin, Waxhaw, Ballantyne, Pineville, Matthews, Indian Trail, Stallings, Mint Hill, Huntersville, Concord, and surrounding communities in Mecklenburg, Union, and Cabarrus Counties, NC.

## Contact

- Phone: (704) 989-6027
- Email: jdpone@gmail.com
- Quote form: https://jdplandscaping.com/quote

- Fully Insured

- Free estimates
- Built on referrals
